name: execution-truth-layer
description: Verify agent workflow outcomes against external SQL ground truth

scripts.test: npm run build && node scripts/pg-ci-init.mjs && vitest run && node --test test/reconciler.sqlite.test.mjs test/pipeline.sqlite.test.mjs test/withWorkflowVerification.test.mjs test/workflowTruthReport.test.mjs test/cli.test.mjs test/postgres-session-readonly.test.mjs test/postgres-privilege.test.mjs test/pipeline.postgres.test.mjs test/docs-contract.test.mjs && node scripts/first-run.mjs
